song.title: I Love You, Lord
song.author: Laurie Klein, Go Fish
song.presentation: C V1 V2 B C V3 V4 B C
song.lyrics: [C] . D I love You, Lord, . A7 D And I lift my voice . G D Em To worship You. . A A7 O my soul, rejoice! . D A D Take joy, my King, in what You hear. . G F#m A May it be a sweet, sweet sound . G D In Your ear. [V1] .D A G D I know that I fail You. .D A G D I know that I need You. .D A G D A A7 That’s why I stand before You now. [V2] I’ve tried to do my best, But on my own I fail the test. I need Your healing touch right now. [B] . G D A D So I clear out the thoughts that clutter my mind. . G D A Bm And for once in a day, I forget about the time. .G D G D A Jesus, I pray that You hear this song of mine. [V3] You say that You hear me. You say that You are near me. And so I bow before You now. [V4] You gave Your life, now I’ll never die. A priceless gift to such a fool as I. I’ll never understand, but I’m thanking You now.
